schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: "Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme" by the Social Welfare Department, Government of Chhattisgarh provides financial assistance for the education and training of differently-abled children, who are regular students in a school or college. The application needs to be submitted in prescribed format to the District Office, Panchayat and Social Welfare / Janpad Panchayat Office through the Head of the Institution.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
- ₹150/- per month for the Students of 1st to 5th Standard
- ₹170/- per month for the Students of 6th to 8th Standard
- ₹190/- per month for the Students of 9th to 12th Standard
schemeContent.briefDescription: "Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme" provides financial assistance for the education and training of differently-abled children, who are regular students in a school or college. The application needs to be submitted to the District Office, Panchayat and Social Welfare / Janpad Panchayat Office.

children.text: "Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme" by the Social Welfare Department, Government of Chhattisgarh provides financial assistance for the education and training of differently-abled children, who are regular students in a school or college. The application needs to be submitted in prescribed format to the District Office, Panchayat and Social Welfare / Janpad Panchayat Office through the Head of the Institution.
₹150/- per month for the Students of 1st to 5th Standard
₹170/- per month for the Students of 6th to 8th Standard
₹190/- per month for the Students of 9th to 12th Standard
The interested applicant should take print of the
of the application form available on the official website of the Social Welfare Department, Government of Chhattisgarh.
In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents, within the prescribed period (if any), to the
District Office of Social Welfare / Janpad  Panchayat Office
through the Head of the institution.

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Step 1:** The interested applicant should take print of the [prescribed format](https://sw.cg.gov.in/sites/default/files/divyangscholarshipscheme.pdf) of the application form available on the official website of the Social Welfare Department, Government of Chhattisgarh.
**Step 2:** In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
**Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents, within the prescribed period (if any), to the **District Office of Social Welfare / Janpad  Panchayat Office** through the Head of the institution.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
- The applicant should be a resident of Chhattisgarh.
- The applicant should be a Student.
- The applicant should be differently-abled.
- The applicant should have a disability of 40% or above.
- The applicant should be a regular student in a college/technical school.

children.text: The applicant should be a resident of Chhattisgarh.
The applicant should be a Student.
The applicant should have a disability of 40% or above.
The applicant should be a regular student in a college/technical school.
